description: A universal, fractal civilizational ontology mapping human, social, and planetary evolution.

foundations.name: Foundation
foundations.subtitle: Material Base
foundations.description: The physical substrate and infrastructure required for civilization to exist.

foundations.name: Vitality
foundations.subtitle: Life & Ecology
foundations.description: The biological and ecological systems that sustain living beings and the planet.

foundations.name: Agency
foundations.subtitle: Economy & Production
foundations.description: The capacity to act, produce, create value, and transform material conditions.

foundations.name: Cohesion
foundations.subtitle: Community & Culture
foundations.description: The social fabric, relationships, and shared identities that bind people together.

foundations.name: Governance
foundations.subtitle: Coordination & Law
foundations.description: The structures, laws, and institutions through which societies coordinate and resolve conflict.

foundations.name: Vision
foundations.subtitle: Knowledge & Foresight
foundations.description: The capacity to understand reality, learn, and anticipate the future.

foundations.name: Consciousness
foundations.subtitle: Meaning & Purpose
foundations.description: The orienting layer that provides direction, ethics, and meaning to civilization.
